scope.target: HANDOFF-001 machine-readable receiving checkpoint, critical gate evidence, and provider-native attribution compatibility
constraints: Fail closed on red critical gate
Require real provider fixtures before provider-specific rules
non_goals: Normalize all providers to one trailer

steps: Redesign commit attribution acceptance without mutation
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented the generic receiving-checkpoint policy, machine contract, template, read-only validator, stable instance registry, 15 fail-closed GWT cases, aggregate/hosted routing, four-path fixture inventory, and REL-owned fail-closed phase interface without changing provider settings or the existing Git commit validator.
execution.next_action: Commit the HANDOFF core, run the real critical gate at that clean subject commit, then register and repository-verify a V050-008 checkpoint instance before completing HANDOFF-001.

results.residual_risk: Provider fixture availability may block attribution closeout.
